Quick Answer

In brief, Black-Eyed Children is a pre-existing Modern Legends subject built around the modern legend of children with completely dark eyes who ask for entry into cars, homes, or private spaces. Its strongest image is specific enough to follow across retellings while still leaving room for careful interpretation.

The main movement is clear: The familiar account centers on the modern legend of children with completely dark eyes who ask for entry into cars, homes, or private spaces. Versions of Black-Eyed Children differ by source, region, period, or online retelling, but the central anchor remains Black-Eyed Children. Black-Eyed Children may be read as a story about how repeated sightings become modern folklore.

Where Later Versions Differ

Later retellings do not always keep the same emphasis. Versions of Black-Eyed Children differ by source, region, period, or online retelling, but the central anchor remains Black-Eyed Children.
